summary: VenuLoQ Mobile Venue Search Page Premium Polish - All 11 requested features tested and verified on mobile viewport (390x844). Visual refinements confirmed working: Updated title section copy ('Explore Venues'), reduced filter button visual weight, refined card action icons, cleaned up Top Pick badge, improved visual hierarchy.

mobile_search_page_loads.details: Page loads at /venues/search on mobile viewport (390x844) with venue cards visible

title_header.details: 'Explore Venues' title visible in compact header section, shows '20 verified spaces' count

filter_button_header.details: Filter button (SlidersHorizontal icon) in header opens FilterBottomSheet correctly

quick_filter_chips.details: Wedding, Corporate, Reception, Birthday chips visible and toggle correctly (active state: bg-[#0B0B0D] text-white)

venue_cards_display.details: MobileVenueCard shows image (130px width), name, location (MapPin icon), venue type, capacity (Users icon), price (gold color)

top_pick_badge.details: Top Pick badge with Crown icon visible on first 2 cards, styled with bg-[#0B0B0D]/75 and gold text

compare_favorite_buttons.details: Compare (Scale icon) and Favorite (Heart icon) buttons visible and clickable on venue cards

venue_type_popover.details: Venue Type filter popover opens on click, shows 'Select Venue Types' with Apply/Clear options

sort_dropdown.details: Sort dropdown (Recommended by default) is visible and functional

view_toggle.details: List/Map view toggle works - switches between venue list and Leaflet map view

venue_card_navigation.details: Clicking venue card navigates to detail page (e.g., /venues/venue_4d3c6d3cd967)

visual_refinements_verified.title_section_copy: Header shows 'Explore Venues' with conditional city text (line 891)
visual_refinements_verified.filter_button_reduced_weight: Filter button uses border border-slate-200 bg-white styling (line 872-875)
visual_refinements_verified.card_action_icons_refined: Compare (Scale w-3 h-3) and Favorite (Heart w-3 h-3) buttons with rounded-lg styling
visual_refinements_verified.top_pick_badge_cleaned: Minimal badge design: Crown icon (w-2.5 h-2.5) + uppercase text (8px), bg-[#0B0B0D]/75 backdrop-blur-sm
visual_refinements_verified.visual_hierarchy: Clear separation: dark compact header, light content area, cards with slate-200/80 borders

critical_code_review_comments: Code review of VenueSearchPage.js mobile view (lines 851-1089) confirms all visual refinements:
1. Title: 'Explore Venues' displayed in h1 (line 891) with venue count below
2. Filter button: Uses outline style w-9 h-9 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white (line 872-875)
3. MobileVenueCard (lines 465-567): Compact design with 130px image, refined action buttons (w-7 h-7 rounded-lg)
4. Top Pick badge (lines 506-510): bg-[#0B0B0D]/75 backdrop-blur-sm with Crown icon (w-2.5 h-2.5)
5. Quick filter chips: Clean border-slate-200 styling with active state toggle
context_for_next_testing_agent: VenuLoQ mobile venue search page premium polish verified. All 5 visual refinements confirmed: title section copy, reduced filter button weight, refined card action icons, cleaned Top Pick badge, improved visual hierarchy. MobileVenueCard component is inline in VenueSearchPage.js (line ~465).
